name: get_media_insights
description: Retrieve engagement metrics for a specific media post on a business or creator account. Returns metrics such as impressions, reach, likes, comments, saves, shares, and video views depending on media type.

parameters.name: media_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the media object to get insights for.

parameters.name: metric
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of metrics to retrieve. Available metrics depend on media type (IMAGE, VIDEO, CAROUSEL_ALBUM).

data.name: impressions
data.title: Impressions
data.description: Total number of times the media has been seen

data.name: reach
data.title: Reach
data.description: Total number of unique accounts that have seen the media

data.name: likes
data.title: Likes
data.description: Total number of likes on the media

data.name: saves
data.title: Saves
data.description: Total number of saves of the media
